headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on Alexandria Real Estate, Raises Price Target to $54
summary: BMO Capital  analyst John Kim   maintains Alexandria Real Estate (NYSE:ARE) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $52 to $54.
